steps.t: The camp-site lies east and north of Echad Eregion, beyond Torech Bornagol and Torech Carangor. Golgallon has asked you to search another camp-site fo…
Golgallon is at Echad Eregion, west and south of the camp-site, beyond Torech Carangor and Torech Bornagol. You should return to Golgallon and warn hi…
